commands: ubus-cli WiFi.AccessPoint.1.IEEE80211r.Enabled=1
ubus-cli WiFi.AccessPoint.1.IEEE80211r.MobilityDomain=4660

ubus-cli "WiFi.AccessPoint.1.IEEE80211r.Enabled?" | sed -n 's/^WiFi\.AccessPoint\.1\.IEEE80211r\.Enabled=/Enabled5g=/p'
ubus-cli "WiFi.AccessPoint.1.IEEE80211r.FTOverDSEnable?" | sed -n 's/^WiFi\.AccessPoint\.1\.IEEE80211r\.FTOverDSEnable=/FtOverDs5g=/p'
ubus-cli "WiFi.AccessPoint.1.IEEE80211r.MobilityDomain?" | sed -n 's/^WiFi\.AccessPoint\.1\.IEEE80211r\.MobilityDomain=/MobilityDomain5g=/p'

grep -m1 '^mobility_domain=' /tmp/wl0_hapd.conf | sed 's/^mobility_domain=/MobilityDomainCfg5g=/'
grep -c '^ft_over_ds=1$' /tmp/wl0_hapd.conf | sed 's/^/FtOverDs5gOneCount=/'
grep -c '^ft_over_ds=0$' /tmp/wl0_hapd.conf | sed 's/^/FtOverDs5gZeroCount=/'
grep -c '^ft_over_ds=' /tmp/wl0_hapd.conf | sed 's/^/FtOverDs5gTotalCount=/'

ubus-cli "WiFi.AccessPoint.5.IEEE80211r.FTOverDSEnable?" | sed -n 's/^WiFi\.AccessPoint\.5\.IEEE80211r\.FTOverDSEnable=/FtOverDs24g=/p'
ubus-cli "WiFi.AccessPoint.5.IEEE80211r.MobilityDomain?" | sed -n 's/^WiFi\.AccessPoint\.5\.IEEE80211r\.MobilityDomain=/MobilityDomain24g=/p'

grep -m1 '^mobility_domain=' /tmp/wl2_hapd.conf | sed 's/^mobility_domain=/MobilityDomainCfg24g=/'
grep -c '^ft_over_ds=1$' /tmp/wl2_hapd.conf | sed 's/^/FtOverDs24gOneCount=/'
grep -c '^ft_over_ds=0$' /tmp/wl2_hapd.conf | sed 's/^/FtOverDs24gZeroCount=/'
grep -c '^ft_over_ds=' /tmp/wl2_hapd.conf | sed 's/^/FtOverDs24gTotalCount=/'

ubus-cli WiFi.AccessPoint.1.IEEE80211r.MobilityDomain=0
ubus-cli WiFi.AccessPoint.1.IEEE80211r.Enabled=0

ubus-cli "WiFi.AccessPoint.1.IEEE80211r.Enabled?" | sed -n 's/^WiFi\.AccessPoint\.1\.IEEE80211r\.Enabled=/Enabled5g=/p'
ubus-cli "WiFi.AccessPoint.1.IEEE80211r.FTOverDSEnable?" | sed -n 's/^WiFi\.AccessPoint\.1\.IEEE80211r\.FTOverDSEnable=/FtOverDs5g=/p'
ubus-cli "WiFi.AccessPoint.1.IEEE80211r.MobilityDomain?" | sed -n 's/^WiFi\.AccessPoint\.1\.IEEE80211r\.MobilityDomain=/MobilityDomain5g=/p'

ubus-cli WiFi.AccessPoint.3.IEEE80211r.MobilityDomain=0
ubus-cli WiFi.AccessPoint.3.IEEE80211r.Enabled=0

ubus-cli "WiFi.AccessPoint.3.IEEE80211r.Enabled?" | sed -n 's/^WiFi\.AccessPoint\.3\.IEEE80211r\.Enabled=/Enabled6g=/p'
ubus-cli "WiFi.AccessPoint.3.IEEE80211r.FTOverDSEnable?" | sed -n 's/^WiFi\.AccessPoint\.3\.IEEE80211r\.FTOverDSEnable=/FtOverDs6g=/p'
ubus-cli "WiFi.AccessPoint.3.IEEE80211r.MobilityDomain?" | sed -n 's/^WiFi\.AccessPoint\.3\.IEEE80211r\.MobilityDomain=/MobilityDomain6g=/p'

ubus-cli WiFi.AccessPoint.5.IEEE80211r.MobilityDomain=0
ubus-cli WiFi.AccessPoint.5.IEEE80211r.Enabled=0

ubus-cli "WiFi.AccessPoint.5.IEEE80211r.Enabled?" | sed -n 's/^WiFi\.AccessPoint\.5\.IEEE80211r\.Enabled=/Enabled24g=/p'
ubus-cli "WiFi.AccessPoint.5.IEEE80211r.FTOverDSEnable?" | sed -n 's/^WiFi\.AccessPoint\.5\.IEEE80211r\.FTOverDSEnable=/FtOverDs24g=/p'
ubus-cli "WiFi.AccessPoint.5.IEEE80211r.MobilityDomain?" | sed -n 's/^WiFi\.AccessPoint\.5\.IEEE80211r\.MobilityDomain=/MobilityDomain24g=/p'
